titleStmt.title: SII 9.561: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 561. (A.R. No. 179 of 1913.) ON A SLAB LYING NEAR A SLUICE OF THE TANK AT BUKKAPATNAM, PENUKONDA TALUK, ANANTAPUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is dated Śaka 1455, Vijaya, Phālguṇa, śu. 15, Sthiravāra corresponding to A.D. 1534 February 28, Saturday, in the reign of Achyutadēvarāya. It records that Timmarasa, son of Bhaṇḍārada Apparasaya, restored the dēvadāya and brahmadāya lands below (the tank) Hosakere in the division of Penugoṇḍe, in accordance with the order issued by the king on the completion of the lakshahōma rite performed at Varadarāja-Ammana-pēṭhe.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
ṁ śubhamastu . svasti śrījayābhyudaya
śālivāhanaśakavaruṣaṁgaḷu 1455 neya
vijeyasaṁvatsarada phālguṇa śu 15 sthiravā
radalū śrīmanṛ(ṁ)mahārājādhirāja rājapara
mēśvara śrīvīrapratāpa śrīacutadēvarāyara bhaṁḍā
rada Apparasayanavara makkaḷu tiṁmarasarū hāki
sidā śilāśāsanada kramaveṁteṁdare yeṟamaṁci rā
jyadoḷagaṇa penugoṁḍege saluva hosakereya
keḷagaṇa dēvadāyabrahmadāyake saluva mānya
gaḷa gaddegaḷu cikkaOḍeyara kāla modalāgi sarvva
mānyavāgi naḍavuttā yiralāgi madhye Avāṁ
taravāgi baṁdaṁthā Avanāyagaḷa rokkha dhānya
gaḷanu Acyutadēvamahārāyaru varadarāja
AṁmanapēThe Oḷage lakṣahōmavanu māḍiśi pū
rṇāhutisamayakāladalu �yo dēvadāya
bra(ṁ)hmadāyagaḷanu porvamariyādeyali
sarvamānyavāgi biṭevu �yo dharma Ācan
drārkanāgi naḍeyaluḷadu �yo dharmavanu Ā
ru naḍastaru Avaru pālanādacyutaṁ padaṁ ye
ṁbaṁthā Avaru Acyutapadadali yiralu
ḷavaru �yo dharmake Āru tapidarū Avaru taṁ
ma mātāpitṛgaḷanū vāraṇāsivoḷage vadhisida
pāpadali hōgaluḷavaru gaṁgevoḷage kapileya koṁ
da pāpadali hōgaluḷavaru taṁma mātāpitṛgaḷanu
koṁdu narakada voḷage nūkida pāpadali hōgaluḷavaru
Ēkaiva bhaginī lōkē sarvēṣāmēva bhūbhujāṁ . na bhō
jyā na karagrāhyā vipradattā vasuṁdharā . yeṁbuthā śā
stravidhitāgi yidake Āru tapidaru ta(ṁ)mma Oḍahu
ṭṭidavarige tāvē tapidavaru . svadattāṁ paradattāṁ vā
yō harēti vasundharāṁ . ṣaṣṭivarṣasahasrāṇi
viṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē krimiḥ . �yo dharmake tapidavaru
hēloḷagaṇa huḷuvāgi yiraluḷavaru yaṁdu �yo
mariyādēli bhaṁḍārada tiṁmarasara nirūpadiṁ
da koṁḍapanu Ānetūbinalu hākisida śilāśā
sana maṁgaḷa mahāśrī śrī śrī .
Digital edition of SII 9.561 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
